div.p:
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
before entering the convoy."
Id="REQ-1.1"

textPath.tspan: text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 237px; margin-left: 701px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 200px; height: 139px; overflow: hidden;

div.p:
text="The joining truck shall establish V2V communication
with the lead truck before joining the convoy."
Id="REQ-1.2"

textPath.tspan: text="The joining truck shall establish V2V communication
with the lead truck before joining the convoy."
text="The joining truck shall establish V2V communication
with the lead truck before joining the convoy."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 159px; padding-top: 217px; margin-left: 2009px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 200px; height: 159px; overflow: hidden;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica", "VP Default"; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; word-break: normal; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; height: 100%; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p:
text="The system shall only permit platoon formation when environmental and operational conditions are verified as safe by the Network Operations Center."
Id="REQ-1.4."

textPath.tspan: text="The system shall only permit platoon formation when environmental and operational conditions are verified as safe by the Network Operations Center."
text="The system shall only permit platoon formation when environmental and operational conditions are verified as safe by the Network Operations Center."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 227px; margin-left: 2463px;

div.p:
text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."
Id="REQ-1.5."

textPath.tspan: text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."
text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 524px; margin-left: 2463px;

div.p: text="The join notification shall be delivered to all platoon members within 100 ms of the lead truck receiving a join request."

textPath.tspan: text="The join notification shall be delivered to all platoon members within 100 ms of the lead truck receiving a join request.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 709px; margin-left: 1668px;

div.p:
text="Collision avoidance shall remain active during joining."
Id="REQ-1.4.2"

textPath.tspan: text="Collision avoidance shall remain active during joining."
text="Collision avoidance shall remain active during joining."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 709px; margin-left: 1905px;

div.p: text="Distance shall be continuously monitored every 50 ms."

text="Speed synchronization shall complete within 5 vseconds."
Id="REQ-1.3.2.1."

text="Speed deviation shall not exceed the set upon speed tolerance."
Id="REQ-1.3.1"

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 524px; margin-left: 931px;

div.p:
text="The Network Operations Center shall authorize platoon formation before joining is permitted."
Id="REQ-1.2.3"

text="Speed, position, and braking data shall be exchanged between trucks at a minimum rate of 50 Hz."
Id="REQ-1.2.2"

text="A V2V wireless link (latency no exceeding 20 ms) shall be initiated before the joining truck enters the convoy."

text="The system shall safely transition independent trucks into a synchronized platoon formation."
Id="REQ-1.0."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 276px; margin-left: 1279px;

Id="REQ-1.3.2"

text="The joining truck shall use Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) to match the lead truck’s velocity during convoy insertion."

div.p:
text="The system shall ensure that speed and distance fluctuations do not amplify along the convoy during joining."
Id="REQ-1.4.4."

text="The system shall ensure that speed and distance fluctuations do not amplify along the convoy during joining."
